segments.text: A new friend of mine will always just be me and you, baby
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: And don't try to blame me as one of your sorry fools
segments.speaker: Unknown 2

segments.text: Pones in closing time, oh sweet love of mine
segments.speaker: Unknown 2

segments.text: In a world that's growing so
segments.speaker: Unknown 3

segments.text: Cool off me singing your voice
segments.speaker: Unknown 4

segments.text: Singing you all the songs that our open eyes upon
segments.speaker: Unknown 6

segments.text: I'll go out drinking with all my shameless friends
segments.speaker: Unknown 7

segments.text: I've been having trouble just finding hope again
segments.speaker: Unknown 8

segments.text: I've been sharing the rest of this in my mind
segments.speaker: Unknown 6

segments.text: And dies out when you're right here
segments.speaker: Unknown 9

segments.text: Finally made it over that damn four year drought
segments.speaker: Unknown 6
